data.title: 国际服网页活动「Teatime on the Beach」
data.summary: The “Teatime on the Beach” Web Event featuring the Tea Party students has begun! Visit the official
data.body:
The “Teatime on the Beach” Web Event featuring the Tea Party students has begun!

Visit the official Blue Archive website, and log in each day to unlock new daily rewards, one episode at a time!

Watch as the “Teatime on the Beach” scene on the main screen changes little by little with each episode~ ✨

➡️ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3303921
![G8RLzkmaoAATeSd.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/4417/hvCnqusUYmpkvb6JRWFFlr5pl08ZqS00.jpg)
